chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4636 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.20623/2018. 2. For hearing of main case. 14.04.2025 Mr. Jawad A. Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shamshad Ahmed Narejo, advocate for the respondents. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Counsel states, under instructions, that notices impugned herein shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that same be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending aforesaid, no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondents articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
